sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94194" key="simw|do/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῑμ-ῳδός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n94194.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who sings such songs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2302.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristocl.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
